entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop characteristics to meet food demands and ensure sustainability

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD SUPPLY
entities.description: The goal of maintaining a reliable and long-term food source for the population

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The rapid increase in human population that drives the need for increased food production

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding strategy that uses genomic information to rapidly select superior genotypes

entities.name: ANIMAL BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of selective breeding in animals where genomic selection was first effectively implemented

entities.name: BREEDING CYCLES
entities.description: The time interval required to complete a cycle of selection and breeding in crop improvement

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an individual organism used for selection in breeding

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The overall increase and improvement of agricultural output

entities.name: PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Computational and mathematical models used within genomic selection to predict phenotypic values

entities.name: PREDICTION ACCURACY
entities.description: The measure of how effectively genomic selection models predict the actual traits of a genotype

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A technique used to accelerate the growth and generation turnover of crops to increase breeding efficiency
